_comment: W10a waterfall roar: one positional emitter per Terrain fall site (falls[] on each river record, planted at the bake's plunge base). Gain scales with drop_m (clamped against drop_ref) times Hydrology.flow_norm(river.id) — the flow_norm loudness value W10 asks for. Reuses the existing wind_loop.wav placeholder (no new sound card).
